zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Allington於1442年出生在英國英格蘭艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德時，她的父親William Alington III52歲，母親Elizabeth Argentyne31歲。她於大約1467年與John Arell在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年在英國英格蘭艾可享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Allington于1442年出生在英国英格兰艾可韋斯特 韓寧費爾德时，她的父亲William Alington III52岁，母亲Elizabeth Argentyne31岁。她于大约1467年与John Arell在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年在英国英格兰艾可享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from any of at least nine different places called Allington, two in Kent, three in Wiltshire, and one each in Dorset, Devon, Hampshire, and Lincolnshire. These have different origins: those in Devon, Wiltshire near Chippenham, and Kent near Maidstone are from the Old English personal name Ælla + -ingtūn meaning ‘Ælla's farm’; those in Dorset, Wiltshire near Devizes, and Lincolnshire are named with Old English ætheling ‘prince' + tūn, meaning ‘settlement of the prince’; those in Hampshire and Wiltshire near Amesbury are from the Old English personal name Ealda + tūn; and the one in Kent near Lenham is from the Old English personal name Æthelnōth + -ingtūn, meaning ‘Æthelnōth's farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Allington was born in 1442, in West Hanningfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Alington III, was 52 and her mother, Elizabeth Argentyne, was 31. She married John Arell about 1467, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1468, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Allington est née en 1442, à West Hanningfield, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Alington III, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Argentyne, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Arell environ 1467, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1468, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Allington 1442 in West Hanningfield, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Alington III 52 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Argentyne 31. Sie hat um 1467 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom John Arell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1468 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato John Arell circa 1467, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Margery Allingtonが1442年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウエスト ハニングフィールドで生まれた時，父William Alington IIIは52歳，母Elizabeth Argentyneは31歳であった。約1467年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドでJohn Arellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Allington(이)가 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 웨스트 해닝필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Alington III(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Argentyne(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1467년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 John Arell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Arell aproximadamente 1467, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Allington родилась в 1442 г. в местности вест ханнингфиелд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Alington III было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Argentyne, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Arell около 1467 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1468 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет.
